---
name: ui-regression-check
description: "Use when: reviewing DA-Bubble UI changes for responsive, accessibility, loading, empty, error, and interaction regressions"
---

# UI Regression Check

## Review Areas

- Desktop, tablet, and mobile layouts
- Sidebar, content, thread, modal, and menu behavior
- Loading, empty, error, disabled, and offline states
- Keyboard access and labels
- PWA-specific display quirks where relevant

## Output

Return findings first, then a short checklist of manual verification steps.
